name: Pecan Snowballs
method: Preheat oven to 350°F. In a medium bowl, combine flour, sugar, and salt. Cut in butter until crumbly. Add chopped pecans, add a little water, enough to combine the dough so you can work with it. Roll 1-inch balls between hands and arrange on a parchment-lined baking sheet, 2 inches apart. Bake 10 minutes, or until golden brown. When cookies have cooled down completely roll in powdered sugar. Makes 1 dozen. Olé
